title: EventEnvelope
description: Envelope wrapping every Healuxa domain event published to NATS JetStream. The typed `payload` is defined by the event-specific schema referenced in `schema_ref`.

event_id.description: Globally unique event id. Consumers MUST dedupe/idempotency-key on this.

version.description: Major schema version of this event type.

schema_ref.description: Canonical $id of the payload schema for this exact version.

occurred_at.description: When the domain fact occurred (not when published).

producer.description: Service that owns and emitted this event. MUST equal the registered owner.

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace id for correlation across services.

correlation_id.description: Ties a logical chain of events to a single business operation.

causation_id.description: event_id of the event that directly caused this one.

payload.description: Typed event body; shape defined by the event-specific schema.
